prompt: Write a complete, runnable Flappy Bird clone in Python using pygame. The game must have: a bird that falls with gravity and jumps on spacebar/click, procedurally generated pipes that scroll left at constant speed, collision detection between the bird and pipes, a score counter that increments each time the bird passes through a pipe gap, a game-over screen that shows the final score and lets the player restart by pressing R, and a start screen that waits for spacebar before beginning. Use only pygame and the standard library. Define constants at the top (SCREEN_W=400, SCREEN_H=600, FPS=60, GRAVITY=0.5, JUMP_STRENGTH=-9, PIPE_SPEED=3, PIPE_GAP=160, PIPE_INTERVAL=90). Define these classes: Bird with attributes x, y, velocity; Pipe with attributes x, gap_y. Implement the full game loop. Output complete runnable code only, no prose.

Implement a Flappy Bird physics and rendering engine in Python with pygame. Requirements: 60fps game loop using pygame.time.Clock, gravity accumulation each frame (velocity += GRAVITY), jump resets velocity to JUMP_STRENGTH on SPACE or left mouse click, pipe pairs generated every PIPE_INTERVAL frames, pipes scroll left at PIPE_SPEED pixels per frame, collision uses pygame.Rect intersection for bird vs pipe top and bottom rects and bird vs screen floor/ceiling, score increments when bird x passes pipe center x for first time per pipe pair, background is a gradient sky (top blue to bottom light), bird drawn as a yellow circle with an orange beak, pipes drawn as green rectangles with a darker cap. Write the complete implementation with all classes, constants, and the if __name__ == '__main__': block. No comments, no docstrings, code only.

Write a Flappy Bird game in Python using pygame with an explicit state machine. States: WAITING (bird bobs, waiting for input), PLAYING (normal gameplay), DEAD (bird falling, pause before restart). Transitions: WAITING -> PLAYING on SPACE/click, PLAYING -> DEAD on collision, DEAD -> WAITING after 1.5s delay or on R key. The Bird class must have: update(state) that applies gravity only in PLAYING/DEAD states, draw(screen) that draws the bird with a rotation angle proportional to velocity, jump() that sets velocity and only works in PLAYING state. The Pipe class must have: update() scrolling, draw(screen), is_offscreen(), and collides(bird_rect) methods. Include a PipeManager that maintains a deque of Pipe objects, spawns new ones every PIPE_INTERVAL frames, removes offscreen ones, and has a check_score(bird_x) method. Main loop must handle pygame events, update all objects, draw background/pipes/bird/score/state messages, and flip display. Output complete code only.
